title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-25
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the apps and updating the community metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the app directory and greenhouse metrics accurate and up-to-date for the community.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the monitor robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a clipboard with a checklist, while Polly waters some pixelated code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering pixelated code-plants in a digital greenhouse while a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
